videos.headline: Noah Short reels in 41-yard pass for Army's opening TD
videos.description: Bryson Daily picks out Noah Short with a 41-yard touchdown pass play over middle of the field for Army.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Noah Short reels in 41-yard pass for Army's opening TD) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bryson Daily calls his own number on Army's second TD
videos.description: Army QB Bryson Daily powers through the Rice defense for Army's second touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Touchdown! Bryson Daily scores vs. Rice) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Matt Sykes hauls in a TD for Rice
